description: Create a market research survey titled 'Streaming Services Consumer Evaluation Q4 2024' in LimeSurvey. The survey must include three question groups: 'Platform Usage' containing a Multiple Choice question "Which of the following streaming services have you used in the past 12 months?" with sub-questions for Netflix, Amazon Prime Video, Disney+, HBO Max, Hulu, Apple TV+, and Peacock; 'Service Satisfaction' containing a 5-point choice Array question "How satisfied are you with each streaming service you've used?"; and 'Recommendation Likelihood' containing a 5-point choice Array question "How likely are you to recommend each service?". Both Array questions must use the same 7 sub-questions and have the 'array_filter' attribute set to the question code of the Multiple Choice question. Enable anonymous responses and activate the survey.
